

<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Avatar" align="right" id='img1'>

<div id="div2">
Research associate in the <a href="https://oak-sheffield.weebly.com/" target="_blank">Organisations, Information and Knowledge (OAK) group</a>, part of the Department of Computer Science of the University of Sheffield in the UK.


My interests lie in natural language processing (NLP), NLP for social media, human-centred computing, machine learning and data science. In particular, my future research goals and interests are the development of human-like, affective and multimodal dialogue systems and their applications in the real world to benefit humanity.

I obtained my PhD degree in computer science from the University of Sheffield under the supervision of <a href="https://staffwww.dcs.shef.ac.uk/people/F.Ciravegna/Fabio_Ciravegna/About.html" target="_blank">Prof. Fabio Ciravegna</a>. I researched the characterisation of rumours and their spreading on social media and rumour detection in the early stages of the diffusion of real-world events.
</div>
<br>
<br>
<br>

<div>
 <img src="images/mailto.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;<a href="mailto:suji.han.x@gmail.com">suji.han.x@gmail.com</a></span>
</div>
<div>
 <img src="images/gscholar.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;<a href="https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=GUjlKgcAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google scholar</a></span>
</div>
<div>
 <img src="images/github.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;<a href="http://github.com/soojihan" target="_blank">GitHub</a></span>
</div>
<div>
 <img src="images/linkedin.png" id='img2'>
  <span style="line-height:20px;">&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/soojihan/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></span>
</div>
